top_signals.title: Woman in $150M counterfeit postage shipping scheme sentenced to prison
top_signals.summary:
A federal court in California sentenced a woman to prison for using counterfeit postage to ship millions of parcels through the U.S. Postal Service.

The post Woman in $150M counterfeit postage shipping scheme sentenced to prison appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Banking Committee's Sen. Rounds liked Warsh's 'tone' in first testimony as Fed chairman
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh was on Capitol Hill for two days of testimony this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sen. Warren says Trump's CFPB overhaul has cost Americans $26.5 billion
top_signals.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren says the Trump administration's rollback of CFPB rules and enforcement has cost Americans up to $26.5 billion so far.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve announces the leadership and objectives of its task forces to advance the conduct of monetary policy
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve announces the leadership and objectives of its task forces to advance the conduct of monetary policy
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Asian exchanges call for regional connectivity to capture capital inflows
U.S. International Trade in Goods and Services, May 2026
top_signals.summary: The U.S. goods and services trade deficit increased in May 2026 according to the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis and the U.S. Census Bureau. The deficit increased from $54.6 billion in April (revised) to $77.6 billion in May, as exports decreased and imports increased. The goods deficit increased $23.6 billion in May to $106.5 billion. The services surplus increased $0.6 billion in May to $28.9 billion. Full Text
